steps.title: Connect action to goal
steps.content: The first sentence says Marion Whitney championed avant-garde art and helped artists gain exposure. The second sentence describes a concrete action she took to promote those works by trying to place them in a museum and then founding her own.

steps.title: Pick a purpose transition
steps.content: B would introduce a restatement, C would introduce a contrast, and D would introduce a concession. "To this end" means "to accomplish this goal," which fits Whitney's museum-related action. The answer is A.
